name: fasterizy
description: Speed up agent planning, discussion, and docs without losing technical effectiveness. Code stays unchanged.

interface.shortDescription: Faster agent turns in planning and docs. Same technical accuracy.
interface.longDescription: Speed up work with AI coding agents without losing technical effectiveness. Applies to agent replies during discussion, planning, and Markdown documentation. Source code, commits, and line-by-line reviews stay unchanged. Fewer output tokens are a secondary benefit. Install hooks via `npx fasterizy install` or use the Codex plugin with hooks enabled.
defaultPrompt: Use fasterizy: speed up planning, discussion, and docs. Keep technical accuracy. Code stays unchanged.
